description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Publish releases that triggers on push. It should have two jobs: create-release and pyinstaller-executable. The create-release job runs on ubuntu-latest, determines a tag based on the branch or tag, and then creates a new release, deleting any previous one. The pyinstaller-executable job depends on create-release, runs on a matrix of operating systems, sets up Python 3.9, builds a development environment, caches pip dependencies, builds an executable with PyInstaller, publishes it as a release asset, and notifies collaborators with a comment.
